title: American British Academy
summary: The ABA Oman International School, earlier known as American British Academy is a private, non-profit, co-educational international school in Muscat, Oman established in September 1987. It offers a K-12 English-language curriculum to expatriate students. ABA is an International Baccalaureate World Continuum School, which enrolls 940 students from pre-kindergarten to grade 12 from more than 65 countries. ABA is the first school in the region to offer the IB programme — PYP, MYP and the IB DP.
text:
The ABA Oman International School, earlier known as American British Academy is a private, non-profit, co-educational international school in Muscat, Oman established in September 1987. It offers a K-12 English-language curriculum to expatriate students. ABA is an International Baccalaureate World Continuum School, which enrolls 940 students from pre-kindergarten to grade 12 from more than 65 countries. ABA is the first school in the region to offer the IB programme — PYP, MYP and the IB DP.
